scrapecreators.description: ScrapeCreators YouTube transcript retrieval from public YouTube URLs

youtube-transcript.description: YouTube transcript retrieval through ScrapeCreators; does not generate transcripts from audio
youtube-transcript.pricingNotes: ScrapeCreators YouTube transcript retrieval is credit-based rather than duration-based. AutoShow estimates 1 credit per transcript request at the published Freelance reference rate ($47 / 25,000 credits). Free credits, plan discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: ScrapeCreators YouTube transcript retrieval accepts youtube.com and youtu.be URLs only. Pricing is credit-based rather than duration-based: AutoShow estimates one credit per transcript request using the published Freelance reference rate.
